subcodes.first_line: O Lord, O Divine One, O Compassionate One! This servant of Thine hath hastened from the farthest lands of the East unto the West, that perchance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: پروردگارا یزدانا مهربانا این بنده تو از اقصی بلاد شرق بغرب شتافت که شاید از
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for teaching, @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @prayer for assistance; intercession, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
